title: elaphrium purpusii
intro: Elaphrium purpusii, also known as Purpus' Elaphrium, is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Elaphrium purpusii include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote healing. Elaphrium purpusii can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
